epigraph.quote: Charles & Jenny arrived at tea time, from Germany at the end of their honey moon. John & Kaz arrived in time for supper.

per_stop.quote: He & William worked on the zig-zagging conveyor belts with Chris & 2 other Polish workmen.
We saw Clevedon Pier. Then we parked out of town & found a deserted path into Ladye Bay (treacherous tides) & walked along the coastal path a bit.
We looked at the lovely church & got back to the van just before another terrific rain shower.
Charles & Jenny arrived at tea time, from Germany at the end of their honey moon. John & Kaz arrived in time for supper.
